_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Neurogenic bladder - Package for evaluation / investigation (catheter + ultrasound + culture + RGU/MCU) for 1 month (medicines - antibiotics)
min_doctor_qualification: MS/DNB or Equivalent (in Urology, Pediatric Surgery)
clinical_indications: Spinal cord injuries – stroke, brain tumour, Parkinson disease, Multiple sclerosis, Diabetic, Pelvic surgeries.
To diagnose the root cause for detrusor underactivity to over activity.
To rule out/decrease Urinary tract infections

preauth.label: Detailed Clinical notes with history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings and advice for admission
Post void residual urine determination/ Urodynamic testing

claim.label: Retrograde urethrogram (RGU)/ Micturating Cysto-Urethrogram (MCU) with patient ID and Date
Detailed Procedure / Operative notes, Antibiotic given

ppd_preauth.q: Was the clinical notes and Post void residual urine determination/ Urodynamic testing reports indicative of procedure?

common_queries: Clinical notes and/or Post void residual urine determination/ Urodynamic testing reports are not indicative of the procedure.
Detailed clinical notes are missing or incomplete, lacking history, indications, symptoms, signs, examination findings, or advice for admission.
Post void residual urine determination or Urodynamic test report is missing or not submitted.
Detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details are not available.
Retrograde urethrogram (RGU) or Micturating Cysto-Urethrogram (MCU) reports are missing or do not include patient ID and date.
Detailed Procedure / Operative notes or Antibiotic given notes are missing or incomplete.
Detailed discharge summary is missing or incomplete.

clinical_key_pointers: Neurogenic bladder is a term applied to urinary bladder malfunction due to neurologic dysfunction emanating from internal or external trauma, disease, or injury.
surgical_options: Open or Laparoscopic bladder suspension surgery
